Name: Atlantic Data Security
Description: Atlantic Data Security is dedicated to providing our clients with the security solutions and services needed to best mitigate risk and maintain a healthy security posture. As a trusted security advisor, we take the time to understand the unique needs and goals of our clients and then overcome the challenges in our collective way. In addition to a shortage of resources, one of the most common challenges in today's security landscape is staying ahead of constantly evolving threats.

Name: Axonius
Description: Axonius transforms asset intelligence into intelligent action.With the Axonius Asset Cloud, customers preemptively tackle hard-to-spot threat exposures, misconfigurations, and operational challenges across their entire technology footprint – all in one place backed by a comprehensive asset data model. The Axonius Asset Cloud streamlines the end-to-end lifecycle of all assets through our market-leading Adapter Network. We build a complete, accurate, and always up-to-date model of your entire attack surface, directing focus to the most critical actions with the right context to make smart data-driven decisions right-sized to your capacity. With a single platform covering cyber assets, software assets, SaaS applications, identities, infrastructure, and more, Axonius equips Security, IT, and GRC teams with total visibility and sharp actionability to continuously optimize mission-critical risk, performance, and cost measures – measures that every Board cares about. The actionability era of cybersecurity is here. Learn more at www.axonius.com

Name: Cato Networks
Description: At Cato Networks, we are SASE. Our SASE platform is a converged, cloud service architected to deliver on the promise of SASE, which is to secure and optimize the business everywhere, for everyone, and for every use case. Cato Networks combines world-class security and networking into a purpose-built SASE platform.

Name: Cyera
Description: Cyera is the world's leading Security Platform for AI, purpose-built for the age of AI. As AI transforms how data is created, accessed, and used, Cyera's mission is to empower businesses to accelerate AI adoption by defining a holistic approach to security--from data to access to model. The platform provides organizations with a unified control plane that understands relationships between data, access, and behaviors across humans, systems, AI tools and agents. Valued at $9 billion and backed by more than $1.7 billion in funding from top-tier investors including Accel, Blackstone, Coatue, Cyberstarts, Georgian, Greenoaks, Lightspeed, Redpoint, and Sequoia, Cyera is trusted by a growing number of Fortune 1000 companies adopting AI across their enterprise at scale.

Name: Cyberhaven
Description: Cyberhaven protects sensitive data wherever it lives and goes. As an AI and Data Security Platform, it unifies discovery, classification, lineage, investigation, and policy controls across endpoints, SaaS, cloud, on-prem, and AI tools. Cyberhaven continuously discovers data at rest, in motion, and in use, then applies AI-based classification plus context from lineage, provenance, and ownership to distinguish real risk from noise. The result is holistic visibility and control, deeper understanding of data, and a simpler way to operate. Security teams can reduce blind spots, investigate faster, guide users clearly, and secure AI adoption with greater confidence.

Name: Delinea
Description: Delinea is a pioneer in securing identities through centralized authorization, making organizations more secure by seamlessly governing their interactions across the modern enterprise.  Delinea allows organizations to apply context and intelligence throughout the identity lifecycle across cloud and traditional infrastructure, data, and SaaS applications to eliminate identity-related threats. With intelligent authorization, Delinea provides the only platform that enables you to discover all identities, assign appropriate access levels, detect irregularities, and immediately respond to identity threats in real-time.  Delinea accelerates your teams’ adoption by deploying in weeks, not months, and makes them more productive by requiring 90% fewer resources to manage than the nearest competitor. With a guaranteed 99.99% uptime, the Delinea Platform is the most reliable identity security solution available. Learn more about Delinea on LinkedIn, Twitter, and YouTube.

Name: DTG
Description: Distributed Technology Group (DTG) is a certified Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) delivering integrated Cyber Security, Infrastructure, Cloud, and AI ecosystem technologies mapped directly to our clients' strategic objectives. Serving Commercial, Enterprise, Federal, and SLED sectors, we combine certified technical expertise with exceptional service to drive operational success, efficiency, and growth. As a trusted technology partner, DTG empowers organizations to safely navigate and scale within today's complex innovation landscape.

Name: EchoStor Technologies
Description: EchoStor is a consultative IT solutions partner that delivers secure, scalable, and business-driven outcomes across AI, data center, networking, modern workplace, digital workflows, and security. We combine deep technical expertise with vendor-neutral strategy to simplify complexity and accelerate transformation.

Name: ePlus
Description: ePlus is a customer-first, services-led industry leader that helps organizations safely navigate today's complex threat landscape, leveraging over three decades of experience to deliver transformative, resilient technology solutions. While offering a broad portfolio, ePlus prioritizes security as a foundational pillar, providing comprehensive consultative, professional, and managed services designed to secure critical assets. Through expert-led Zero Trust architecture, advanced threat visibility, and data governance, ePlus empowers organizations to mitigate risks, ensure compliance, and innovate with confidence.

Name: Fortinet
Description: Fortinet is a multinational cybersecurity and networking company that provides integrated security solutions, including firewalls, endpoint protection, cloud security, and SD-WAN. Its core ecosystem, the "Security Fabric," links over 50 enterprise-grade products into a unified, AI-driven management platform designed to automatically detect and respond to threats.

Name: HPE
Description: HPE is a leader in essential enterprise technology, bringing together the power of AI, cloud and networking to help organizations achieve more. As pioneers of possibility, our innovation and expertise advance the way people live and work. We empower our customers across industries to optimize operational performance, transform data into foresight, and maximize their impact. Unlock your boldest ambitions, with HPE.

Name: Island
Description: Island created the Enterprise Browser, a simplified enterprise workspace delighting CIOs, CISOs, and end users. The Island Enterprise Browser makes application delivery simple, data fundamentally secure, and work smooth and natural. Island embeds core IT, security, and productivity needs into the browser itself, giving organizations unprecedented last-mile control and visibility over all browser actions. IT teams log and audit work activity while keeping personal browsing private. Security teams protect sensitive data from the most sophisticated attacks with a secure-by-design architecture. And users increase productivity while working in the familiar Chromium-based browser experience. Organizations in defense, financial services, government, higher education, hospitality, manufacturing, and retail modernize security and jumpstart productivity with Island. Investors include Canapi Ventures, Capital One Ventures, Cisco Investments, Citi Ventures, Coatue Management, Cyberstarts, EDBI, Georgian, Insight Partners, Prysm Capital, ServiceNow Ventures, Sequoia Capital, and Stripes. Island is headquartered in Dallas with R&D in Israel and the US.

Name: Tines
Description: Tines is an intelligent workflow platform that powers the world's most important workflows. IT and security teams of all sizes, from Fortune 50 to startups, trust Tines for everything from phishing response, vulnerability and patch management, software lifecycle management, employee lifecycle management, and everything in between. Leaders across a wide array of industries--including Canva, Databricks, Elastic, Kayak, Intercom, and McKesson--use Tines workflows to operate more effectively, mitigate risk, reduce tech debt, and do the work that matters most.

Name: TrendAI
Description: TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk. AI Fearlessly. Learn more: trendaisecurity.com

Name: Varonis
Description: Varonis is a pioneer in data security and analytics, specializing in software for data protection, threat detection and response, and compliance. Varonis protects enterprise data by analyzing data activity, perimeter telemetry, and user behavior; prevents disaster by locking down sensitive data; and efficiently sustains a secure state with automation.

Name: Abnormal Security
Description: Abnormal AI is the leading AI-native human behavior security platform, leveraging machine learning to stop sophisticated inbound attacks and detect compromised accounts across email and connected applications. The anomaly detection engine leverages identity and context to understand human behavior and analyze the risk of every cloud email event-detecting and stopping sophisticated, socially-engineered attacks that target the human vulnerability. You can deploy Abnormal in minutes with an API integration for Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace and experience the full value of the platform instantly. Additional protection is available for Slack, Workday, ServiceNow, Zoom, and multiple other cloud applications. Abnormal is currently trusted by more than 3,200 organizations, including over 24% of the Fortune 500, as it continues to redefine how cybersecurity works in the age of AI.

Name: Brite
Description: Securing your organization is our mission. Through partnering with best-in-breed technology providers, Brite's cybersecurity experts and certified product engineers ensure you're protected today and tomorrow as your needs evolve. Our strategy? Early threat detection, secure access to those who need it when they need it, identify and protect your data, and ensure compliance.

Name: CrowdStrike
Description: CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD), a global cybersecurity leader, has redefined modern security with one of the world's most advanced cloud-native platforms for protecting critical areas of enterprise risk - endpoints and cloud workloads, identity and data.

Name: Expel
Description: Expel is human-led, AI-accelerated security. Our MDR solutions use human expertise and AI to drive out threats, minimize risk, and build lasting security resilience. We work with the tools you already have, covering the attack surfaces that matter most: cloud, identity, email, SIEM, SaaS, and on-prem environments, providing full transparency into everything we see and do. No black boxes. No rip-and-replace. Just clear decisions and faster action. For more information, visit our website, check out our blog, or follow us on LinkedIn.

Name: GuidePoint Security
Description: GuidePoint Security provides trusted cybersecurity expertise, solutions, and services that help organizations make better decisions that minimize risk. Our experts act as your trusted advisor to understand your business and challenges, helping you through an evaluation of your cybersecurity posture and ecosystem to expose risks, optimize resources and implement best-fit solutions. GuidePoint's unmatched expertise has enabled 40% of Fortune 500 companies and more than half of the U.S. government cabinet-level agencies to improve their security posture and reduce risk. Learn more at www.guidepointsecurity.com.

Name: Pellera
Description: Pellera Technologies brings together the combined expertise of Converge Technology Solutions and Mainline Information Systems, uniting more than 35 years of industry leadership and a shared vision for innovation. We help organizations achieve greater efficiency, adaptability, and growth through advanced digital infrastructure, cloud, cybersecurity, and AI solutions. More than a technology provider, Pellera partners with clients to deliver tailored, people-first strategies that simplify complexity, unlock opportunity, and drive measurable, transformational outcomes today and tomorrow--together.

Name: Proofpoint
Description: Proofpoint protects people, data, and AI with human-centric cybersecurity across email, cloud, and collaboration channels.

Name: Synergy IT Solutiions
Description: Synergy IT Solutions helps organizations improve performance, security, and reliability through strategic technology services. As a 100% employee-owned company with more than 50 years of experience, Synergy provides managed IT services, cybersecurity, cloud solutions, unified communications, contact center technology, and professional services. Our team works closely with clients to understand their goals, reduce risk, modernize operations, and build practical technology roadmaps. With offices across Upstate New York and SOC 2 Type II certification, Synergy delivers the expertise, accountability, and responsive support businesses need to make technology work better.

Name: Aspire Technology Partners
Description: Aspire Technology Partners stands as the premier provider of advanced technology solutions and services, designing and implementing tailored, highly sophisticated IT solutions across diverse architectures

Name: Cohesity
Description: Cohesity protects, secures, and provides insights into the world's data. As the leader in AI-powered data security, Cohesity helps organizations strengthen resilience, accelerate recovery, and reduce IT costs. With Zero Trust security and advanced AI/ML, Cohesity Data Cloud is trusted by customers in more than 140 countries, including more than 70% of the Fortune Global 500. Cohesity is also backed by industry leaders such as NVIDIA, Amazon, Google, IBM, Cisco, and HPE.

Name: Doppel
Description: Doppel is the AI-native platform for social engineering defense (SED), protecting individuals and brands from AI-powered impersonation, phishing, fraud, and social engineering through three solutions unified on a shared intelligence layer. Digital Risk Protection (DRP) detects threats across multiple channels, links alerts into a real-time threat graph, and delivers AI-driven infrastructure disruption. Human Risk Management (HRM) turns those live threats into phishing simulation campaigns and next-generation security awareness training, measuring and reducing employee risk by user and team. Email Security adds inline protection, using agentic detection and response backed by the Doppel Threat Graph to stop inbox attacks and disrupt the infrastructure behind them. Together, they defend the entire social engineering attack chain, from infrastructure built before a target is acquired to the moment of compromise, advancing Doppel's mission to protect the world from social engineering, every day.

Name: Hacket Cyber
Description: Hacket Cyber is a cybersecurity services firm that helps organizations understand, reduce, and manage security risk. We work with businesses to identify potential weaknesses, evaluate their security posture, and strengthen their ability to prevent, detect, and respond to threats. Our services are tailored to each organization's environment, priorities, and regulatory requirements. We combine practical technical expertise with clear communication and actionable recommendations, helping clients make informed decisions without unnecessary complexity. Whether supporting a specific initiative, validating existing security controls, or serving as a long-term security partner, Hacket Cyber provides flexible, real-world guidance designed to improve resilience and protect what matters most.

Name: Ivanti, Inc
Description: Ivanti is a global enterprise IT and security software company dedicated to unlocking human potential by managing, automating and protecting data and systems to empower continuous innovation. With adaptable software solutions tailored to customer needs, Ivanti empowers IT and security teams to enhance operational efficiency, cut costs and proactively mitigate security risks. At the heart of Ivanti's offerings is the AI-powered Ivanti Neurons platform, which transforms the way IT and security teams operate. By delivering unified, reusable services and tools, the platform helps ensure consistent visibility, scalability, and secure solution implementation, enabling teams to work smarter, not harder. Ivanti follows "Secure by Design" principles to provide software solutions that scale with our customers' needs to help enable IT and Security to improve operational efficiency while reducing costs and proactively reducing risk. Learn more at www.ivanti.com and follow us on social media @GoIvanti.

Name: Oligo Security
Description: Oligo is the industry's leading runtime security platform that solves today's toughest challenge: stopping attacks in real time in the AI era. Oligo transforms security from passive visibility to active protection across applications, cloud services, workloads, AI applications, and AI agents. By uncovering the deepest layers of what actually runs in production, Oligo empowers customers to prioritize exploitable vulnerabilities, detect malicious behavior as it happens, and stop modern attacks in their tracks.

Name: Optiv
Description: Optiv is the cyber advisory and solutions leader. We manage cyber risk so you can secure your full potential.

Name: Vandis, Inc
Description: Vandis specializes in optimizing and securing hybrid network infrastructures to achieve maximum value for our clients. Customer-focused and engineering strong, we thrive on the curiosity and passion of our team, to create innovative and smart IT solutions tailored to meet our clients' current needs while strategically aligning to future goals. Our long-standing partnerships with leading providers and manufacturers complement our ability to deliver the right solutions to our customers. At Vandis, we understand the unique challenges faced by IT leaders and have developed a comprehensive suite of services to address them. Beginning each engagement with our proven process, anchored by our deep industry knowledge, we deliver solutions and successful outcomes which cultivate strong connections and trust with our customers.

Name: ISACA Western New York Chapter: Trust in, and value from, information systems
Capture The Flag
Description: A CTF is an event where participants work in teams to solve a variety of cybersecurity challenges to find a hidden piece of data called a 'flag'. For example, the participants may be asked to decrypt a message, reverse engineer a binary, or trace some network traffic. Each challenge is based on a real-world cybersecurity concept and is designed to teach the concept as the participant solves it.

Name: Lockpick Village
Description: The Open Organisation Of Lockpickers, or TOOOL, is an international group of lockpicking enthusiasts dedicated to advancing the general public knowledge about locks and lockpicking through teaching, research, and competition. TOOOL in the United States is a fully volunteer-run organization with Chapters in more than 20 states, including affiliated Chapters in Canada.
